messages.content:
写封邮件给admission@mbzuai.ac.ae
说我去年申请过一次 2025 Fall Doctor of Philosophy in Natural Language Processing program at MBZUAI，Application No. 24120376447。今年我又重新申了一遍还是这个项目只是26 Fall入学，编号IA-0000026019。两次用的都是邮箱yileitu我看到你们换了申请系统，我的推荐人还是去年的三位，Freda Shi, Ryan Cotterell和Mrinmaya Sachan。但是我的导师反应他们的邮箱没有收到MBZUAI的推荐信提交链接。或许你能帮忙把去年的推荐信挪到我今年的申请吗？我导师的推荐信内容也没变化，所以我想不用经过他们麻烦他们。

Subject: Request to Transfer Recommendation Letters - Application IA-0000026019

Dear MBZUAI Admissions Committee,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing regarding my application for the 2026 Fall Doctor of Philosophy in Natural Language Processing program (Application No. IA-0000026019). I previously applied for the same program for 2025 Fall admission (Application No. 24120376447), using the same email address (yileitu@...).

I have used the same three recommenders for both applications:
- Professor Freda Shi
- Professor Ryan Cotterell
- Professor Mrinmaya Sachan

However, my recommenders have informed me that they have not received the recommendation letter submission links from MBZUAI this time. I understand that you have transitioned to a new application system, which may have caused this issue.

Since the recommendation letters remain unchanged from my previous application, would it be possible to transfer the letters from my 2025 Fall application (24120376447) to my current 2026 Fall application (IA-0000026019)? This would help avoid inconveniencing my recommenders with duplicate requests.

Thank you very much for your assistance with this matter. Please let me know if you need any additional information from me.

Best regards,
[Your Full Name]
Application No. IA-0000026019
